Name: Apollo Rover - Publish Subgraph Schema
Description:
Publish subgraph schema to Apollo Studio. This should be run after successfully deploying a subgraph service.

The script installs the [Apollo Rover CLI](https://apollographql.com/docs/rover) and runs the `rover subgraph publish` command.

Parameters.Name: ApolloRoverVersion
Parameters.Label: Apollo Rover Version
Parameters.HelpText:
The version of the Apollo Rover CLI to use for running `rover subgraph publish`.
May be either semver (i.e. `0.19.1`), `latest`, or empty

Parameters.Name: ApolloKey
Parameters.Label: Apollo Key
Parameters.HelpText: The API key to Apollo Studio

Parameters.Name: ApolloSubgraphUrl
Parameters.Label: Subgraph Url
Parameters.HelpText: The graphql endpoint url for the subgraph

Parameters.Name: ApolloSchemaPackage
Parameters.Label: Schema Package
Parameters.HelpText: The package containing the schema file

Parameters.Name: ApolloSchema
Parameters.Label: Schema
Parameters.HelpText: The path to the schema file
